items.name: Countries
items.description: Add country data to your library — capitals, populations, currencies, flags, languages, and more.

items.name: The Movie Database (TMDB)
items.description: Build a movie or TV show collection with ratings, cast, posters, and release dates. Requires an API key.

items.name: Open Library
items.description: Catalog your books with titles, authors, covers, and editions from the world's largest open book database. No API key required.

items.name: Dictionary
items.description: Look up English word definitions, phonetics, synonyms, antonyms, and example sentences. No API key required.

items.name: Dogs
items.description: Browse dog breeds with descriptions, temperaments, life expectancy, and weight info. No API key required.

items.name: Finnhub
items.description: Search stock symbols and financial market data including company profiles and quotes. Requires an API key.

items.name: Fruityvice
items.description: Explore fruits with nutritional facts including calories, sugar, fat, and carbohydrates. No API key required.

items.name: GBIF Species
items.description: Search biodiversity species records from the Global Biodiversity Information Facility. No API key required.

items.name: Jikan (MyAnimeList)
items.description: Search anime and manga titles with ratings, genres, synopses, and episode counts via the MyAnimeList API. No API key required.

items.name: Stripe
items.description: Search your Stripe customers and payment data. Requires a Stripe secret API key.

items.name: USDA Food Data
items.description: Search the USDA FoodData Central for detailed nutritional information on thousands of foods. Requires an API key.

items.name: Wikipedia
items.description: Fetch article summaries and introductions from Wikipedia. No API key required.
